name: Salsa Verde Chicken Kabobs - Chi-chi's
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container or food processor, combine the salsa verde, olive oil, lime juice, and garlic. Process until smooth.
2. Remove 2/3 cup of this mixture and set aside in the refrigerator.
3. Place the chicken pieces in a resealable plastic food storage bag. Pour the remaining salsa mixture over the chicken. Seal the bag and turn it several times to coat the pieces thoroughly. Refrigerate, turning the bag occasionally for at least four hours or overnight.
4. In a large bowl, combine the vegetables and cilantro. Stir in the reserved 2/3 cup of salsa verde mixture. Add salt and pepper to taste. Set aside.
5. Thread the chicken pieces onto 8 long bamboo skewers (ensure the skewers are soaked in water for 30 minutes before use). Cook over medium hot coals, grilling the kabobs five minutes on each side or until no longer pink in the center.
6. Grill two bananas lengthwise for about one minute on each side.
7. Serve the chicken and grilled bananas on top of the cabbage mixture.
